metadata.title: UAE Anglers Hub — UAE's Premier Shore Fishing Community
metadata.description: Discover 50+ verified fishing spots across all 7 Emirates. Log catches, join tournaments, connect with UAE anglers, and get AI-powered fishing forecasts.

auth.passwordRequirements: Min. 8 characters with a number or special character
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link.

hero.headline: Catch More. Explore Smarter. Connect Deeper.
hero.subheadline: 45+ verified spots across all 7 Emirates. The UAE's first community-powered coastal fish database.
